vocab.meaning: các điều khoản ràng buộc trong hợp đồng
vocab.example: It is imperative to read with precision when reviewing contractual obligations to avoid any future legal disputes.

vocab.meaning: sự xem xét kỹ lưỡng, tỉ mỉ
vocab.example: Academic journals require meticulous scrutiny because missing even a minor data point can skew your entire understanding.

vocab.meaning: đọc một cách thong thả, thoải mái
vocab.example: When I’m on holiday, I prefer to peruse lifestyle magazines at leisure without any pressure to retain information.

vocab.meaning: mổ xẻ, phân tích các lập luận phức tạp
vocab.example: Philosophical texts force you to read slowly to unpick complex arguments that aren't apparent at first glance.

vocab.meaning: nghiền ngẫm, hiểu thấu đáo nội dung
vocab.example: I need a quiet environment to fully digest the contents of a technical report before the weekly briefing.

vocab.meaning: cái nhìn lướt qua nhanh, hời hợt
vocab.example: For social media updates, a cursory glance is usually sufficient to stay informed about what my friends are up to.

vocab.meaning: hiểu ý tại ngôn ngoại (đọc được ẩn ý)
vocab.example: In literature, you often have to read between the lines to uncover the protagonist's true motivations.
To avoid informational overload, I tend to filter out irrelevant subtitles and only focus on the headlines.

vocab.meaning: những chi tiết nhỏ nhặt/tinh vi
vocab.example: When following a sophisticated recipe, paying attention to the finer details of the measurements is crucial for success.

vocab.meaning: đọc lướt qua nhanh để tìm ý chính
vocab.example: I usually skim through the terms and conditions of mobile apps, as they are often repetitive and exhaustive.
